claim_checks.source_quality_note: The snippet comes from a university lecture note (University of Surrey) and multiple authoritative definitions of decoherence, which are consistent with the claim.

claim_checks.problem: Simplification of 'environmental measurement' may imply traditional measurement collapse, whereas decoherence involves entanglement and information loss without conscious observation
claim_checks.suggested_fix: Clarify that decoherence involves environmental entanglement disrupting quantum coherence, rather than the environment acting as a measurement device
claim_checks.source_quality_note: MIT lecture notes are authoritative educational sources
